production_note: agentic_H2 dual-LLM Skeptic: solved from quiz_card+slim_packet only; independent of H1; packet-only; no stamps; direct agent output; no prior-attempt lives

exercises.code:
# Skeptic: invert starter defect; keep fixture data
record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-035-1A", **{'drops': {'shared_phone': 0.1, 'amount_7d': 0.03}, 'metric': 'precision_at_k', 'means_fraud': False}}
meets_contract = record["means_fraud"] is False
status = "PASS" if bool(meets_contract) else "REJECT_CAUSAL_CLAIM"
print("S35-T1-A", status)

Soporte: «S35-T1-A-E2 · Modela tres rutas de `coeficientes e importancia por permutación`: fixture válido, fix». Intento agentic_H2 independiente de H1.

Skeptic S35-T1-A-E3: contrasté starter vs instruction del quiz_card/slim_packet. Defectos invertidos o TODO resueltos; ancla `def decide(record: dict) -> str:`. Soporte: «S35-T1-A-E3 · Contrasta fallo cerrado para `coeficientes e importancia por permutación` con tres fix». Intento agentic_H2 independiente de H1.
